temporal_description: A high-angle, wide shot captures a tense meeting in a modern, sterile-looking room. Five men in light-colored, short-sleeved shirts are seated around a large, dark grey conference table. They appear to be listening intently. On the table are papers, mugs, and a black cap. Standing before them, with his hands on his hips, is a man in a white shirt, dark tie, and dark trousers, looking down at the group. In the background, a staircase is visible through a glass partition. To the left, an old-style television on a stand displays a grainy, black-and-white image. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner. The camera cuts to a medium close-up, focusing on the standing man. He maintains a serious, authoritative expression, looking slightly off-camera. The television screen is visible but out of focus behind him. The Chinese watermark remains in the upper left corner of the frame. A man speaks in a serious and formal tone, delivering information with a steady, deliberate pace. His voice is clear and carries a sense of gravity as he reports, "我们到达大厦八分钟前，有人堕楼。" (Eight minutes before we arrived at the building, someone jumped from a building.) The audio is quiet, with no background music or other sound effects, placing all the focus on the man's solemn statement.
